title: Pirate Ship Performance Review
text:
## Pirate Ship Performance Review

Crewmate: {person}

This quarter, you {past-tense verb} {number} enemy {plural noun} and kept the {color} {object} mostly dry.

Strengths include {verb ending in -ing} during storms and saying {silly word} with a {adjective} accent.

Areas to improve: stop feeding {food} to the ship's {animal} and remember to {verb} before entering the captain's {place}.

Overall rating: {emotion}, with a bonus {noun} if your {body part} heals before {day of week} at {place}.
